description: Create a new VeraCrypt volume specifically formatted with the Ext4 filesystem to support Linux permissions. Create a 100MB volume at '/home/ga/Volumes/sysadmin_vault.hc' with password 'SysAdmin!2024'. Inside the volume, create a shell script named 'deploy_fix.sh' (content: echo "Deploying critical fix...") and make it executable. Also create a directory named 'ssh_keys' and restrict its permissions to 700 (drwx------). Dismount the volume when finished.
